tasks.subject: Task 0: Set up upstream reference clone
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Have a byte-exact copy of `hollow/dotfiles@cef10b6` on disk for verbatim copying and diffing (including tracked modes).

**Files:**
- Create: `/tmp/hollow-dotfiles` (ephemeral working clone)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` prints `cef10b6`.

**Verify:** `git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD` -> `cef10b6`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git -C /tmp/hollow-dotfiles rev-parse --short HEAD", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HEAD short hash is cef10b6"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor the vscode config files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `vscode/settings.json` and `vscode/keybindings.json` byte-identical to upstream (mode `100644`), and `vscode/mcp.json` emptied to `{"servers": {}}`.

**Files:**
- Create: `vscode/settings.json` (verbatim)
- Create: `vscode/keybindings.json` (verbatim)
- Create: `vscode/mcp.json` (emptied — deviation)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] settings.json mode 100644 blob efa248b91094a2ada7a8990431bf391339d4c8ab.
- [ ] keybindings.json mode 100644 blob e820d1c9bbaa30d064545d2c1a99611cb198e054.
- [ ] mcp.json is exactly `{` / tab+`"servers": {}` / `}` + trailing newline; no servers.

**Verify:** `diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s vscode/settings.json vscode/keybindings.json) <(git ls-files -s vscode/settings.json vscode/keybindings.json)` empty + `python3 -c "import json; assert json.load(open('vscode/mcp.json'))=={'servers':{}}"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["vscode/settings.json", "vscode/keybindings.json", "vscode/mcp.json"], "verifyCommand": "git add vscode/settings.json vscode/keybindings.json && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s vscode/settings.json vscode/keybindings.json) <(git ls-files -s vscode/settings.json vscode/keybindings.json) && python3 -c \"import json; assert json.load(open('vscode/mcp.json'))=={'servers':{}}; print('MCP OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["settings.json blob efa248b mode 100644", "keybindings.json blob e820d1c mode 100644", "mcp.json == servers empty"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add visual-studio-code cask + curated extensions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `cask "visual-studio-code"` and the sorted 37-entry `vscode` block to the `Brewfile`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile` (append `cask "visual-studio-code"` after `cask "tailscale-app"`, then 37 `vscode` lines)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `cask "visual-studio-code"` directly after `cask "tailscale-app"`.
- [ ] 37-line alphabetically-sorted `vscode` block matching the curated list.
- [ ] Only non-upstream `vscode` entries are the 4 approved additions; all other `vscode`/`cask` lines exist upstream.
- [ ] `brew bundle list --all` parses (skip if brew unavailable).

**Verify:** cask after tailscale-app + exactly 37 vscode lines + additions == exactly catppuccin x3 + hverlin.mise-vscode + no unexpected cask.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "grep -A1 '^cask \"tailscale-app\"' Brewfile | grep -qx 'cask \"visual-studio-code\"' && test \"$(grep -c '^vscode ' Brewfile)\" = 37", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cask after tailscale-app", "37 sorted vscode lines", "exactly 4 non-upstream additions", "no unexpected cask"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add the vscode .zshrc section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert the byte-identical vscode section into `zsh/.zshrc` between the `brew` block and `# 1password`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] vscode section byte-identical to upstream, between `zi auto has"dscl" for brew` and `# 1password`.
- [ ] `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc` passes.

**Verify:** `zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(sed -n '/^# vscode: visual studio code editor/,/^zi auto has"code" wait for vscode/p' zsh/.zshrc) <(sed -n '/^# vscode: visual studio code editor/,/^zi auto has"code" wait for vscode/p' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc)`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && diff <(sed -n '/^# vscode: visual studio code editor/,/^zi auto has\"code\" wait for vscode/p' zsh/.zshrc) <(sed -n '/^# vscode: visual studio code editor/,/^zi auto has\"code\" wait for vscode/p' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["vscode section byte-identical between brew and 1password", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Remove input artifact + faithfulness audit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove the temporary `extensions.txt` and confirm the ring is faithful: config-file fidelity, Brewfile subset + exactly-4 additions, `.zshrc` strict line-subset.

**Files:**
- Delete: `extensions.txt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `extensions.txt` no longer exists.
- [ ] settings.json + keybindings.json mode+blob match upstream; mcp.json is `{"servers": {}}`.
- [ ] Every non-blank `zsh/.zshrc` line exists upstream (no EXTRA); `zsh -n` passes.
- [ ] Every cask + upstream vscode line exists upstream; only non-upstream vscode entries are the 4 additions.
- [ ] `git status` clean.

**Verify:** audit script prints CONFIG FILES OK, MCP EMPTY OK, ADDITIONS EXACTLY 4, no EXTRA/UNEXPECTED, ZSHRC PARSES, clean git status.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["extensions.txt"], "verifyCommand": "test ! -e extensions.txt && diff <(cd /tmp/hollow-dotfiles && git ls-files -s vscode/settings.json vscode/keybindings.json) <(git ls-files -s vscode/settings.json vscode/keybindings.json) && python3 -c \"import json; assert json.load(open('vscode/mcp.json'))=={'servers':{}}\" && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && comm -23 <(grep -vE '^[[:space:]]*$' zsh/.zshrc | sort -u) <(grep -vE '^[[:space:]]*$' /tmp/hollow-dotfiles/zsh/.zshrc | sort -u)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["extensions.txt removed", "config files match, mcp empty", "zshrc strict line-subset", "brewfile additions exactly 4", "git status clean"]}
```
